message: Designed a ranked set of experiments: an interpretable logistic-regression baseline plus a stronger gradient-boosting model on the engagement features. We'll validate with 5-fold cross-validation and lock away 20% of the data for an honest final score, within a bounded compute budget.
reasoning: Started with an explainable baseline, escalated to a stronger learner, honored the excluded leaky field, and chose validation that gives a trustworthy AUC.

ProposedExperiments.Label: Logistic regression baseline
ProposedExperiments.Rationale: An interpretable baseline so the team has an explainable starting point and a benchmark to beat.

ProposedExperiments.Label: Gradient boosting on engagement
ProposedExperiments.Rationale: Typically captures non-linear engagement patterns that lift AUC over the linear baseline.
